questions.question: A coffee shop mixes $2$ cups of Arabica beans with $3$ cups of Robusta beans to make a blend. What is the ratio of Arabica to total beans?
A juice company combines $15%$ pineapple juice with $85%$ orange juice to make a tropical mix. If the total mix is $480$ ounces, how many ounces of pineapple juice are in the mix?
A furniture maker uses $3$ pounds of polyurethane to $7$ pounds of wood polish to make a protective coating. What is the ratio of polyurethane to wood polish?
A farmer has $480$ gallons of a $12%$ insecticide solution. How many gallons of pure insecticide are in the solution?
A chemist mixes $2$ liters of a $15%$ acid solution with $3$ liters of a $20%$ acid solution. What is the concentration of acid in the final mixture?
A bakery mixes $240$ pounds of $8%$ sugar cookies with $160$ pounds of $12%$ sugar cookies. What percentage of sugar is in the final mix?
A company makes a cleaning solution by mixing $60$ gallons of $5%$ bleach solution with $40$ gallons of $15%$ bleach solution. What is the percentage of bleach in the final mixture?
A pharmacist mixes $120$ milliliters of a $25%$ medication with $80$ milliliters of a $30%$ medication. What percentage of the medication is in the final mixture?
Tom has $12$ pounds of a $20%$ nitrogen fertilizer and $8$ pounds of a $30%$ nitrogen fertilizer. He wants to mix them to get a $25%$ nitrogen fertilizer. How many pounds of each type should he use?

A water tank can hold $1000$ gallons of water. Currently, it has $300$ gallons of $5%$ saltwater and $200$ gallons of $10%$ saltwater. What amount of fresh water should be added to achieve a $4%$ saltwater concentration in the tank?
